name: missing-npi
description: Same office-visit packet as happy-path but with the ordering-provider NPI line removed, so R-PA-016 (ordering NPI present + Luhn-valid) fires as a block finding.

documents.name: pa-form.txt
documents.text:
PA Cover sheet
Prior Authorization Request Form
Patient: Jane Q Doe
DOB: 1985-03-12
Member ID: W123456789
Date of service: 2026-04-12
Place of service: 11
Procedure 99213 office visit
Quantity: 1
Duration: 12 months requested.
Dx: I10 essential hypertension
TIN: 123456789
Signature: Jane Doe MD, 2026-04-12

documents.name: note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: hypertension follow-up
Assessment and plan: continue 99213-level office visit.
Medical necessity: required for blood-pressure control.
Note date: 2026-04-12
Signed: Jane Doe MD, 2026-04-12
